_doc: P4-01 step 2 -- persona-match regression corpus (20 labeled request -> expected-persona cases). Runs against the REAL, shipped 99-persona catalog (22-book-to-persona-coaching-leadership-system/persona-categories.json), never a synthetic fixture, so it measures actual production match quality. Each `request` is phrased the way a real board task/content request reads (drawing on request shapes named in the P4/spec cluster: content/comms tasks, sales scripts, coaching notes, marketing copy). `dimension` selects which pure matcher function is exercised: 'topic' -> persona_blend.match_topic_persona(catalog, request); 'audience' -> persona_blend.match_audience_persona(catalog, request) (request is then read as an audience LABEL, not a task). The gate (test-persona-match-regression-corpus.py) requires >=90% of cases to land on `expected_persona_id`. This corpus is a drift lock: an unrelated change to _tag_hit/_stem/ranking that quietly degrades match quality trips this gate before it reaches prod.

cases.request: Write ad copy pitching a new high-ticket offer with bonuses stacking and a strong money-back guarantee
Draft a cold outreach and lead generation sequence to bring in new leads via paid ads and referrals
Write persuasive sales copy applying influence and persuasion psychology and reciprocity to convert skeptical buyers
Write a coaching note about identity change and continuous improvement using small systems design habits for personal development
cases.note: distinguishes from duhigg-power-of-habit via identity-change/systems-design/continuous-improvement, which duhigg does not carry

cases.request: Prepare talking points for a crucial and difficult conversation with a direct report about accountability
Write an empathetic newsletter about vulnerability shame resilience and emotional courage for leaders
Write a positioning and brand strategy blog post about permission marketing and finding your smallest viable market
Draft a financial planning newsletter about profit first cash flow management and owner pay for small business owners
Write sales call discovery questions using the NEPQ sales-questioning and objection-reframing framework
Write a scroll-stopping hook and headline for a short-form video to capture attention in the first three seconds
Write a motivational post about mental toughness discipline and overcoming adversity for our morning accountability broadcast
Write a productivity newsletter about building a second brain note-taking and personal knowledge management
Draft a weekly planning email about execution discipline and the 12 week year goal execution system
Write sales email copy using language patterns and influence-language techniques to change the reader's mind
Write direct-response sales email copy with strong headlines and calls-to-action for a landing page
Write an internal memo about organizational excellence execution discipline and building a great company culture
Draft a sales script using magic words, assumptive phrasing, and conversation control to get buy-in during the meeting
cases.note: distinguishes from gitomer-sales-bible via magic-words/assumptive-phrasing/conversation-control/meeting-and-buy-in-scripts, which gitomer does not carry

cases.request: small business owners
cases.note: audience-label match: small-business-owners / service-business-owners / agency-owners cluster (usable_as includes 'audience')

cases.request: leaders and people managers doing emotional work
cases.note: audience-label match: leaders / people-managers / professionals-doing-emotional-work (usable_as includes 'audience')

cases.request: men facing adversity and discipline seekers
